# Réka Mészáros-Erdei

> Réka Mészáros-Erdei is a Business Analyst based in Diósd, Hungary, with expertise in digital transformation, IT strategy, and business process optimization across the energy, healthcare, and IT-services sectors. She bridges business needs and technical delivery — from requirement gathering and stakeholder management to agile project coordination.

Réka holds an MSc and BSc in Chemical and Process Engineering from the Budapest University of Technology and Economics (BME), and currently works as a Business Analyst at CommIT Smart. She speaks Hungarian, English, German, and Spanish.

Core areas of expertise: Business Analysis, Digital Transformation, IT Strategy, Agile Methodology, Process Optimization, Requirement Gathering, and Stakeholder Management. Tools and technologies include Microsoft 365, Jira, Confluence, OSIsoft PI, Python, SQL, WordPress, and Figma.

The website is bilingual (English and Hungarian).

## Pages (English)
- [Home](https://rekameszaroserdei.com/en/): Introduction, core competencies, professional experience, and education.
- [About](https://rekameszaroserdei.com/en/about/): Background, personal interests, values, and approach to work.
- [Work](https://rekameszaroserdei.com/en/work/): Selected projects and case studies.

## Pages (Hungarian)
- [Főoldal](https://rekameszaroserdei.com/hu/): Bemutatkozás, kompetenciák, szakmai tapasztalat és tanulmányok.
- [Rólam](https://rekameszaroserdei.com/hu/rolam/): Háttér, érdeklődési körök, értékek és munkamódszer.
- [Munkáim](https://rekameszaroserdei.com/hu/munkaim/): Kiemelt projektek és esettanulmányok.
